sources.themes: Proto-cuneiform, Sumerian city-states, early Egyptian hieroglyphs, administrative writing, earliest wisdom literature (Instructions of Shuruppak)
Late Antique monastic schools, Byzantine, Islamic golden age (al-Ghazali, madrasah, House of Wisdom), Carolingian renaissance, medieval universities, scholasticism
Humanist *studia humanitatis* (Petrarch, Erasmus), printing press effects, Cartesian method, Baconian empiricism, early scientific societies
Locke on education, Rousseau's *Émile*, Diderot's *Encyclopédie*, Kant, Scottish Enlightenment (Ferguson, Smith), public education emergence
Newman's *Idea of a University*, Humboldtian research model, Marx on alienation, Ruskin and Morris on craft, compulsory schooling, professional-society formation
Dewey, Russell, Arendt, Polanyi, Kuhn, Dreyfus, cognitive revolution, computers in education, internet, early AI assistants
LLMs, ChatGPT mass adoption, RCT evidence (Bastani, Kestin, Barcaui), MIT "Brain on ChatGPT" (Kosmyna), Cognitive Threshold framework
West African griot oral tradition, Aztec huehuetlatolli, Japanese terakoya, Indian 14 vidyas, Egyptian Ma'at, Chinese Analects / Mencius / Xunzi
Craft knowledge (Crawford *Shop Class*, Sennett *Craftsman*), tacit knowledge (Polanyi), embodied cognition, flow (Csikszentmihalyi), apprenticeship
